notes: Prong A: Item-text k-NN within subject. For each test (s, item) encode item, find K=20 most cosine-similar training items the same subject answered, take softmax-weighted (T=0.05) mean of labels. Blend with smoothed subject_mean: p = BETA*p_knn + (1-BETA)*p_subj. BETA=0.4. Falls back to sub 21 for cold-start subjects.
